strengths: 20 years of continuous engineering across web, mobile, embedded, distributed systems, and cloud-native tooling—well above the 15-year minimum and demonstrates the cross-domain technical breadth expected of a director-level IC

Actively building AI-agent infrastructure at re:cinq right now: MCP code generators and agentic workflow frameworks place this candidate at the operational frontier of exactly the AI tooling the role is focused on

Decade-long founder of GISCollective, an open-source geo-data platform in production use by real NGOs—satisfies the entrepreneurial builder criterion and shows sustained product ownership beyond salaried employment
concerns: Current titles (Staff/Senior SWE) sit below the Director-level individual-contributor seniority the role explicitly targets; the resume does not surface evidence of operating at a strategic advisory or organizational-influence tier
Sustained AI product depth is nascent—the MCP and agentic work dates from April 2025; the role seeks recognized expertise with demonstrated AI platforms built over a longer horizon

No evidence of advising external strategic customers or partners on cloud and AI adoption, which is a named core responsibility; public-facing influence is limited to community workshops and a single conference talk

key_factors.factor: Current hands-on AI and MCP infrastructure work

response.justification: Aisha brings over 20 years of genuine full-stack engineering depth—spanning high-throughput distributed systems, embedded hardware, cloud-native tooling with AWS CDK, and now active AI-agent infrastructure—that comfortably clears the experience floor and signals the technical range a Principal AI Strategy role demands. The ongoing MCP code-generator and agentic-workflow work at re:cinq, combined with a decade of open-source platform leadership at GISCollective, maps directly to the builder fluency and entrepreneurial mindset the role prizes. The primary risk is a seniority gap: the resume reflects a strong senior-to-staff individual contributor rather than a director-level strategist with a track record of shaping organizational direction or advising enterprise customers, but for a team prepared to invest in that elevation the technical foundation is unusually solid.
